title: Binary String With Substrings Representing 1 To N
hints: Notice that binary representations of numbers up to N have limited length. How does this relate to the length of S?
Since S is short, you only need to check numbers whose binary forms fit within S. What is the maximum number of bits needed?
Focus on the smallest numbers. If S contains all binary strings of length k, it likely contains all numbers up to 2^k - 1.
